issues.title: Enemy dealt 47 dmg (85% of 55 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 4 (seq 352), the enemy dealt 47 damage which is 85% of the player's 55 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 32 dmg (100% of 32 HP) on floor 3 enc 2
issues.description: On floor 3, encounter 2, turn 5 (seq 357), the enemy dealt 32 damage which is 100% of the player's 32 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing enemy damage scaling or adding damage caps for this enemy type.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 by knowledge_golem (boss)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 3, encounter 2 against knowledge_golem (boss). Accuracy was 47% over 5 turns. They dealt 16 damage and took 92 damage. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing boss HP or damage for early floors.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 0: 19 turns vs prev floor avg 7.0 (2.7x)
issues.description: Encounter 0 on floor 2 (enemy: shadow_mimic, common) took 19 turns to resolve, which is 2.7x the previous floor's average of 7.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: Floor 2 enc 2: 15 turns vs prev floor avg 7.0 (2.1x)
issues.description: Encounter 2 on floor 2 (enemy: ember_drake, mini_boss) took 15 turns to resolve, which is 2.1x the previous floor's average of 7.0 turns. This exceeds the 2x threshold and indicates a difficulty spike.
issues.suggestedFix: Smooth difficulty curve between floors or reduce this enemy's HP/damage.

issues.title: Card type 'aoe' never played across entire run
issues.description: The card type 'aoe' was never used in any play_card action during the entire 9-encounter run. Card types used: buff, debuff, shield, heal, attack, utility, regen. This may indicate the type is never dealt or is unappealing to play.
issues.suggestedFix: Ensure 'aoe' cards appear in starting deck or are offered as rewards.
